spec: offices/pm/inbox/2026-05-08-from-spool-engine-on-test-blocked-2-p0-bugs.md (Stories A/B/C from Spool's P0 inbox note)
backlogItem: B-043 (Pi auto-sync + conditional shutdown) -- engine-on critical path. Closes the two bugs sitting behind Sprint 25 _initializeConnection fix that produced 0 realtime_data rows in 2026-05-08 engine-on test.

testBaseline.note: Post-Sprint-26 close baseline (V0.26.0 main@09d41b0). Sprint 26 added ~10 new test files. Verify exact count at sprint start.

sprintNotes: GOAL: Sprint 25 fixed the 27-hour _initializeConnection hang, but Spool's 2026-05-08 engine-on test produced ZERO realtime_data rows due to TWO bugs sitting behind that fix: (BUG-1) US-211 reconnect daemon thread is silent -- logged ZERO retry attempts for 11+ hours after a 30s timeout; (BUG-2) data logger fails to restart when _handleConnectionRestored fires after an initial connection-failure path. Drive 6 is GATED on these fixes. Pi-to-ignition wiring lands ~5/9 weekend per Spool 2026-05-06; once that activates, every key-on becomes a Pi cold-boot where the OBDLink LX may not be ready by the 30s _initializeConnection timeout -- the reconnect path becomes the COMMON path, not an outlier. Sprint 27 ships Mike's 2026-05-08 standing direction: '10-second heartbeat listening to see if the OBD Bluetooth is alive.'

EXECUTION ORDER (deps-aware): TIER 1A (P0, parallel) -- US-301 (heartbeat daemon) + US-302 (data logger restart). TIER 2 (deps US-301 + US-302) -- US-303 (engine-on bench harness; the regression gate that should have caught both bugs).

THEME: 'Drive 6 unblock.' Per the V0.24.1 anti-pattern lesson (silent threads + no heartbeat + no canary): every story applies the heartbeat + boot-canary + loud-bail discipline. Every silent thread becomes a WARNING+ log line. Every boot-time wiring assumption becomes a self-test that ERRORs if violated.

CONSTRAINTS (anti-blocker discipline + V0.24.1 + BL-010 lessons): (a) US-274 file-existence check ran during grooming; UPDATE paths verified on disk. (b) US-282 commit-vs-claim verifier (--check-feedback) active for sprint close. (c) Per BL-009: NO architectural ambiguity -- US-301 cadence (10s) + retry-attempt-on-each-tick + boot canary all mandated upfront per Mike's directive. (d) Per BL-010 + feedback_pm_verify_table_names_against_code.md: PM verified all symbol/file names against source code BEFORE writing into contract (rg confirmed src/pi/obdii/reconnect_loop.py exists; data_logger lives in src/pi/obdii/data/logger.py per __pycache__). (e) Per feedback_runtime_validation_required.md: every fix story has a synthetic test that would FAIL pre-fix.

GROUNDING SOURCES: Spool 2026-05-08 engine-on-test-blocked inbox note (full Stories A/B/C spec + 11-hour daemon-silence evidence + 8-second connection-restored window with zero data-logger restart) + V0.24.1 anti-pattern lesson (specs/anti-patterns.md Cross-Module Module Identity entry; mandates heartbeat + canary + loud-bail) + Mike's 2026-05-08 verbatim direction on 10s heartbeat cadence + Pi-to-ignition wiring schedule (~5/9 per Spool).

POST-SPRINT-27 ACTION ITEMS (NOT in sprint.json per CIO no-human-tasks rule): (1) CIO performs Pi-to-ignition wiring (~5/9 weekend). (2) Drive 6 capture + Spool tuning-judgment review ritual. (3) First street-driving capture (15-20 min mixed; Spool data-collection ritual). (4) Marcus bumps deploy/RELEASE_VERSION V0.26.0 -> V0.27.0 at sprint close per SemVer convention. (5) Post-Sprint-26 PM action item still open: phantom-path drift formalization (Rex flagged 11 cases in Sprint 26; extend US-274 lint or add scope-fence amendment).

stories.title: obd-reconnect-heartbeat: 10s cadence + boot canary + loud bails
stories.intent: Spool 2026-05-08 BUG-1: After Sprint 25's _initializeConnection 30s timeout fires (engine off / OBDLink unpowered), the reconnect daemon thread is supposed to keep retrying. In production it logged ZERO retries for 11+ hours. When CIO turned engine on, daemon stayed silent. Manual `systemctl restart` was the only way to reconnect. Same anti-pattern as V0.24.1 (silent thread + no heartbeat + no canary). Mike's verbatim direction 2026-05-08: 'I do think it should have a heartbeat of every 10 seconds listening and looking to see if the OBD Bluetooth is alive or shut off and was restarted.' Sprint 27 applies the V0.24.1 lesson: 10s INFO heartbeat + boot-time canary + loud-bail logging every retry. Critical before Pi-wiring activates car-coupled lifecycle (~5/9 weekend) where every key-on hits this path.

filesToTouch: src/pi/obdii/reconnect_loop.py (UPDATE -- audit existing US-211 daemon; if no heartbeat, add 10s INFO log line per tick in the form 'RECONNECT HEARTBEAT | ticks=N | last_attempt_seconds_ago=X | last_attempt_outcome=Y'; if no retry-on-tick, add a single connect attempt with 5s timeout per 10s tick; preserve existing thread lifecycle)

src/pi/obdii/orchestrator/lifecycle.py (UPDATE -- add boot-time canary _verifyReconnectDaemonAlive that fires within 30s of runLoop entry; ERROR-logs if daemon thread is not alive AND state is PENDING; mirrors V0.24.1's _verifyOrchestratorCallbackWiring pattern)

tests/pi/obdii/test_reconnect_loop_heartbeat.py (NEW -- mocks PENDING state + simulated time; asserts daemon emits >= 3 heartbeats in 30s; asserts each tick attempts connect; asserts boot canary fires; would FAIL pre-fix because no heartbeat exists)

If 5s connect timeout proves too aggressive on a real OBDLink LX (BT pairing window) -- STOP, document; default to 10s timeout with explanation

stories.title: data-logger-restart-on-connection-restored
stories.intent: Spool 2026-05-08 BUG-2: When _initializeConnection times out at 30s, the orchestrator runLoop enters with 'Failed to start data logger: Cannot start realtime logging - not connected to OBD-II' ERROR. 8 seconds later when _handleConnectionRestored fires (OBD link alive, 17 PIDs probed), the data logger is NOT re-started -- it stays in failed state. Result: zero realtime_data rows written despite live OBD link. Sprint 27 wires _handleConnectionRestored to (re-)start the data logger; data logger start() becomes idempotent (safe to call repeatedly); health check reports new field data_logger_last_row_seconds_ago for fast post-mortem.

filesToTouch: src/pi/obdii/orchestrator/event_router.py (UPDATE -- _handleConnectionRestored handler must trigger dataLogger.start() if not running; if already running, no-op cleanly; idempotent + exception-isolated per Sprint 26 US-299 pattern)

src/pi/obdii/data/logger.py (UPDATE -- start() becomes idempotent: if already started, return cleanly; if started but in failed state, restart cleanly; preserve existing happy-path; expose lastRowWrittenSeconds property for health check)
src/pi/obdii/orchestrator/core.py (UPDATE -- health check renders data_logger_last_row_seconds_ago field per minute)

tests/pi/obdii/test_data_logger_restart_on_restore.py (NEW -- mocks failed-init -> connection-restored sequence; asserts data logger restarts + writes a row within 60s; would FAIL pre-fix because handler is not wired to data logger)

stories.title: engine-on bench harness: simulate adapter-late-arrives flow
stories.intent: Spool 2026-05-08 Story C: Sprint 25 US-286 bench harness mocked at I2C/BT edge but assumed adapter present at orchestrator init. The production-realistic flow is: service starts with no OBD adapter present (engine off / OBDLink unpowered) -> _initializeConnection 30s timeout -> reconnect daemon takes over -> adapter wakes up later -> _handleConnectionRestored fires -> data logger starts -> rows written. US-301 + US-302 close the silent gaps in that path. Sprint 27 ships the bench-test harness that exercises THE WHOLE FLOW: would have caught BUG-1 + BUG-2 pre-Sprint-25-deploy. The regression gate Spool's been asking for since Sprint 25.

filesToTouch: tests/pi/integration/test_engine_on_late_adapter_e2e.py (NEW -- extends US-286 mock-at-edge pattern; service starts with no adapter present mock; reconnect daemon ticks; adapter wakes up after N seconds via mock; _handleConnectionRestored fires; data logger starts; row is written; asserts the WHOLE flow lands within budget; would FAIL pre-fix because reconnect daemon never retries (BUG-1) or data logger never restarts (BUG-2))
filesToRead: tests/pi/integration/test_engine_drive_capture_e2e.py (Sprint 25 US-286 mock-at-edge harness; mirror its construction pattern)
